channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump-backed spending bill goes down in flames as shutdown looms
item.description: The House of Representatives is in chaos amid a last-minute bid to avert a Friday government shutdown.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump backs plan B spending deal, urges swift passage
item.description: “All Republicans, and even the Democrats, should do what is best for our Country, and vote ‘YES’ for this Bill, TONIGHT!“ Trump posted on Truth Social.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Dems say 'hell no' to GOP plan B on government funding, debt ceiling
item.description: House Democrats are rallying in overwhelming opposition to the Republicans' second stab at a government funding bill, vowing to sink it on the House floor and force GOP leaders back to the table to negotiate a bipartisan compromise.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Prosecutor Fani Willis is removed from the Georgia election case against Trump and others
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A state appeals court on Thursday removed Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis from the Georgia election interference case against Donald Trump and others, the latest legal victory for the president-elect in criminal cases that once threatened his career and freedom.
item.dc:creator: KATE BRUMBACK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump backs plan B spending deal, urges swift passage
item.description: President-elect Trump on Thursday backed a new spending deal brokered by House Republicans to avert a shutdown after an initial proposal was torpedoed amid opposition from Trump and several of his allies.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House Republicans agree on Plan B government funding bill with Trump's debt limit increase
item.description: House Republicans have reached an agreement on funding the government before Friday's shutdown deadline. The deal would also suspend the debt limit for two years.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New House GOP budget proposal revives Farm Bill extension and aid money but drops ethanol provision
item.description: American farmers are hoping that aid to agriculture will be revived as Congress struggles to avert a looming partial government shutdown.
item.dc:creator: Steve Karnowski, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: White House says Biden will visit Pope Francis, Meloni in final international trip of his presidency
item.description: President Joe Biden will travel to Italy next month to meet with Pope Francis and top Italian officials for what is expected to be the final international trip of his presidency.
item.dc:creator: Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Some House Republicans privately furious at Musk, Ramaswamy after government shutdown talks implode
item.description: Some House Republicans are privately fuming at the 11th-hour involvement of Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy in government funding talks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Johnson spending deal throws Speakership into question as floor vote approaches
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson’s handling of an end-of-year spending deal is throwing his grasp on the gavel into uncertain territory ahead of a critical Jan. 3 Speaker vote, as some GOP lawmakers question their support for the Louisiana Republican. Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Fani Willis disqualified as prosecutor on Trump Georgia election case
item.description: A Georgia appeals court booted Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis's (D) office from the 2020 election interference case against President-elect Trump on Thursday due to her relationship with a top prosecutor on the case.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Tim Scott's Senate campaign arm staff revealed ahead of crucial 2026 swing state races
item.description: Sen. Tim Scott is bringing on a slate of GOP veterans with a variety of political experiences as he looks to expand the Republican Senate majority in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senate passes defense bill that will raise troop pay and aims to counter China's power
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Senate passed a defense bill Wednesday that authorizes significant pay raises for junior enlisted service members, aims to counter China's growing power and boosts overall military spending to $895 billion while also stripping coverage of transgender medical treatments for chil
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN GROVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vance meets with Johnson after Trump torpedoes spending bill
item.description: Vice President-elect JD Vance met with Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Wednesday night, hours after President-elect Trump torpedoed the GOP leader’s spending deal.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill O'Reilly: Kash Patel 'salivating' to investigate Liz Cheney
item.description: "If Liz Cheney witness tampered, she deserves the FBI being all over her front lawn," O'Reilly said on NewsNation's "CUOMO.
item.dc:creator: Chris Cuomo, NewsNation

item.title: Lawmakers caught off guard by Trump debt ceiling demand
item.description: Lawmakers on both sides of the aisle appeared caught off guard Wednesday as President-elect Trump demanded that a debt ceiling hike be paired with a stopgap government funding bill, rejecting a sweeping bipartisan plan to avert a government shutdown this week.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Party switch paying off? Valdes secures committee leadership after joining GOP
item.description: One state Representative in the Tampa Bay area made the controversial move to switch political parties, just last week. The news came was greeted with both cheers and criticisms.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Pornhub to block access in Florida amid lawsuit over new age verification law
item.description: Pornhub said it will block access to its website from Florida as an adult entertainment advocacy group sues over the state's new law requiring age verification.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former top aide to Mayor Adams expected in court on criminal charges: sources
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A former top aide to New York City Mayor Eric Adams is expected in court Thursday to face corruption charges in the latest blow to an administration beset by searches, resignations and the mayor's own indictment.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: House Ethics Committee secretly voted to release Matt Gaetz ethics report, source says
item.description: The House Ethics Committee has voted in secret to release the long-awaited ethics report into former Rep. Matt Gaetz.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump, Vance call for clean CR, debt ceiling hike, urge GOP to sink Johnson compromise
item.description: President-elect Trump and Vice President-elect Vance on Wednesday called for Republicans to approve a clean stopgap funding bill paired with a hike to the debt ceiling, saying the previous government-funding measure negotiated by Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) should be torpedoed.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Global warming can’t be ignored, Montana’s top court says, upholding landmark climate case
item.description: Montana’s Supreme Court has upheld a landmark climate ruling that said the state was violating residents’ constitutional right to a clean environment by permitting oil, gas and coal projects without regard for global warming.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Federal Reserve cuts its key rate by a quarter-point but envisions fewer reductions next year
item.description: The Federal Reserve cut its key interest rate by a quarter-point — its third cut this year — but also signaled that it expects to reduce rates more slowly next year than it previously envisioned, largely because of still-elevated inflation.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Senate passes $895 billion Defense bill despite transgender care provision fight
item.description: Senators voted 85 to 14 in favor of passing the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), well more than the 60 needed in the 100-member upper chamber.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: Senate passes defense bill that will raise troop pay and aims to counter China's power
item.description: The Senate has passed a defense bill that authorize significant pay raises for junior enlisted service members and boost overall military spending to $895 billion. It also strips coverage of transgender medical treatments for children of military members.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Supreme Court will hear arguments over the law that could ban TikTok in the U.S. if it's not sold
item.description: The justices said Wednesday they will hear arguments Jan. 10 about whether the law impermissibly restricts speech in violation of the First Amendment.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Gaetz defends ‘embarrassing’ past behavior, fires shot at Ethics report
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) is defending what he says is "embarrassing, though not criminal" past behavior and taking a shot at the House Ethics Committee, following reports that the panel voted to release its findings about him.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Why shooting down mystery drones carries big risks
item.description: The buzz around the mysterious flurry of drones above New Jersey and other nearby states has prompted some officials, including President-elect Trump, to call for the U.S. military to shoot down the mystery objects. But such measures come with major risks, experts say.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, NewsNation

item.title: Horsford vows to defend Nevada families as priority for government cuts grows
item.description: Nevada Democratic Rep. Steven Horsford is doing more than just serving as a watchdog on Republican initiatives to cut government bureaucracy -- he's participating in the process.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The president of the NCAA calls for a ban on 'prop bets' in college sports
item.description: As sports betting has spread across the U.S., college athletes have increasingly faced harassment from bettors. A federal ban on wagers that concern individual performances could help, the NCAA says.
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan, MPR News

item.title: In disputed Shakopee-area legislative race, voters share what was on uncounted ballots
item.description: While 20 ballots believed to have been discarded before being counted won’t be recovered, some voters who cast those missing ballots shared what was on them. They appear to show Rep. Brad Tabke’s narrow lead would stand up.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: TikTok asks the Supreme Court for an emergency order to block a U.S. ban unless it’s sold
item.description: A similar plea was filed by content creators who rely on the platform for income and some of TikTok’s more than 170 million users in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump weighs in on NYC mayor, vaccines and drones in freewheeling press conference at Mar-a-Lago
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump told reporters that he would consider pardoning embattled New York Mayor Eric Adams, said the country was “not going to lose” the polio vaccine and weighed in on the flurry of drone sightings over New Jersey during a freewheeling press conference Monday at his Mar-a-Lago
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
